title: NLP-009-explain-tf-idf-and-its-significance-in-document-retrieval.原理与应用
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-009 Explain TF-IDF and its significance in document retrieval.

 9. Explain TF-IDF and its significance in document retrieval.
答案要点:
- 公式: TF-IDF = TF × IDF
  - TF (Term Frequency): 词在文档中的频率
  - IDF (Inverse Document Frequency): log(N/df) 降低常见词权重
- 作用: 突出文档特有词，抑制常见词
- 应用: Search Engines, Document Similarity, Keyword Extraction
- 局限: 忽略词序和语义

代码示例:
python
from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import TfidfVectorizer

corpus = ["NLP is great", "NLP is fun"]
vecto...

sections.title: 9. Explain TF-IDF and its significance in document retrieval.
sections.content:
**答案要点:**
- **公式**: TF-IDF = TF × IDF
  - TF (Term Frequency): 词在文档中的频率
  - IDF (Inverse Document Frequency): log(N/df) 降低常见词权重
- **作用**: 突出文档特有词，抑制常见词
- **应用**: Search Engines, Document Similarity, Keyword Extraction
- **局限**: 忽略词序和语义

**代码示例:**
```python
from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import TfidfVectorizer

corpus = ["NLP is great", "NLP is fun"]
vectorizer = TfidfVectorizer()
X = vectorizer.fit_transform(corpus)
```

**质量评分**: 92/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
